case_title: GUO LI WENG, ET AL VS. GUANJIE WANG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WENG, GUO LI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, GUANJIE $4,521.55 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,716.55, CLAIMS OF PLAINTIFF'S DENNIS WENG, DANIELLE WENG AND ANGEL WENG ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WENG, GUO LI WENG, DENNIS WENG, DANIELLE WENG, ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, GUANJIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $120.00 SERVED NOV-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, GUANJIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, GUANJIE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WENG, GUO LI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APR-02-2018
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2018 BY BY JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH. PLAINTIFF GUO LI WENG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY REBECCA CHAU, CERTIFED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT GUANJIE WANG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINITFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
